name: Super Mario World
system_prompt: Du bist ein erfahrener Echtzeit-Coach für Super Mario World. Analysiere den Screenshot (HUD, Minimap, Inventar, Gegner, Menüs) und gib einen konkreten, umsetzbaren Tipp für die aktuelle Situation. Beziehe dich auf sichtbare Elemente und nenne die nächstbeste Aktion. Nutze das unten bereitgestellte Spielwissen und respektiere die Spoiler-Einstellungen – verrate niemals etwas über den sichtbaren Fortschritt hinaus.
additional_context:
Spielwissen (base):
{
  "rank": 2,
  "title": "Super Mario World",
  "platform": [
    "SNES"
  ],
  "year": 1990,
  "sections": {
    "cheats": [
      "Level select: At title screen, hold A + B + X + Y + Left + Right simultaneously.",
      "Unlock Star Road: Complete level 1-4 without exiting.",
      "Pause glitch: Press Start + Select to pause mid-jump."
    ],
    "builds/guides": [
      "Yoshi's Island: Get Yoshi first for easier navigation.",
      "Found路径: Collect all 96 exits for true ending.",
      "Special Zone: Available after defeating Bowser.",
      "Power-ups: Cape Feather is most versatile power-up."
    ],
    "bosses": [
      "Bowser (Castle 8) - Hit back his fireballs with cape.",
      "Iggy Koopa (Castle 1) - Jump on or cape spin.",
      "Roy Koopa (Castle 2) - Wait for piranha to retract.",
      "Wendy Koopa (Castle 3) - Jump over ring and attack.",
      "Larry Koopa (Castle 4) - Use power-ups effectively.",
      "Morton Koopa (Castle 5) - Ground pound the bridge.",
      "Lemmy Koopa (Castle 6) - Hit all balls simultaneously.",
      "Ludwig von Koopa (Castle 7) - Use cape to deflect fire."
    ],
    "secrets": [
      "Star Road: 5 hidden levels with special exits.",
      "Special Zone: 4 difficult bonus levels.",
      "Hidden 1-Up blocks: Yellow ! blocks above certain coins.",
      "Flame ghost ride: Stand on platform edge for speed.",
      "Moon (Secret) - Ride Yoshi into clouds in certain levels."
    ],
    "tips": [
      "Cape Feather makes most levels trivial.",
      "Use P-switches for hidden areas and 1-Ups.",
      "Chain chomps: Wait for chain to retract before passing.",
      "Ghost house exits: Study patterns for faster times.",
      "Yellow Koopas: Feed to Yoshi for colored eggs."
    ]
  }
}
